content: 找出2025年第三季度扣非净利润同比增长率超过50%的公司；查询它们的研发费用和销售费用变化情况；分析费用变化对扣非净利润增长的贡献；结合研报预测这些公司的后续业绩。

tools_used.result:
财报数据库包含以下表：

## _share_capital_cache
字段数: 3
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - report_period (TEXT)
  - share_capital (REAL)

## balance_sheet
字段数: 21
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - asset_cash_and_cash_equivalents (REAL)
  - asset_accounts_receivable (REAL)
  - asset_inventory (REAL)
  - asset_trading_financial_assets (REAL)
  - asset_construction_in_progress (REAL)
  - asset_total_assets (REAL)
  - asset_total_assets_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - liability_accounts_payable (REAL)
  - liability_advance_from_customers (REAL)
  - liability_total_liabilities (REAL)
  - liability_total_liabilities_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - liability_contract_liabilities (REAL)
  ...及其他 6 个字段

## cash_flow_sheet
字段数: 18
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - net_cash_flow (REAL)
  - net_cash_flow_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  - operating_cf_ratio_of_net_cf (REAL)
  - operating_cf_cash_from_sales (REAL)
  - investing_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  - investing_cf_ratio_of_net_cf (REAL)
  - investing_cf_cash_for_investments (REAL)
  - investing_cf_cash_from_investment_recovery (REAL)
  - financing_cf_cash_from_borrowing (REAL)
  - financing_cf_cash_for_debt_repayment (REAL)
  - financing_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  ...及其他 3 个字段

## core_performance_indicators_sheet
字段数: 20
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - eps (REAL)
  - total_operating_revenue (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_qoq_growth (REAL)
  - net_profit_10k_yuan (REAL)
  - net_profit_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - net_profit_qoq_growth (REAL)
  - net_asset_per_share (REAL)
  - roe (REAL)
  - operating_cf_per_share (REAL)
  - net_profit_excl_non_recurring (REAL)
  - net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy (REAL)
  ...及其他 5 个字段

## income_sheet
字段数: 21
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - net_profit (REAL)
  - net_profit_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - other_income (REAL)
  - total_operating_revenue (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_expense_cost_of_sales (REAL)
  - operating_expense_selling_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_administrative_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_financial_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_rnd_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges (REAL)
  - total_operating_expenses (REAL)
  ...及其他 6 个字段

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "SELECT 
  stock_code,
  stock_abbr,
  net_profit_excl_non_recurring,
  net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy,
  total_operating_revenue,
  operating_revenue_yoy_growth,
  operating_expense_rnd_expenses,
  operating_expense_selling_expenses
FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet
WHERE report_period LIKE '2025-Q3' 
  AND net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy > 50
ORDER BY net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy DESC"}
tools_used.result: SQL Error: no such column: operating_expense_rnd_expenses

  operating_expense_rnd_expenses,
  operating_expense_selling_expenses
FROM income_sheet
WHERE report_period LIKE '2025-Q3' 
  AND net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy > 50
ORDER BY net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy DESC"}

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "SELECT 
  c.stock_code,
  c.stock_abbr,
  c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring,
  c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy,
  c.total_operating_revenue,
  c.operating_revenue_yoy_growth,
  i.operating_expense_rnd_expenses,
  i.operating_expense_selling_expenses
FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet c
LEFT JOIN income_sheet i ON c.stock_code = i.stock_code AND c.report_period = i.report_period
WHERE c.report_period = '2025Q3' 
  AND c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy > 50
ORDER BY c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy DESC"}

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "SELECT 
  c.stock_code,
  c.stock_abbr,
  c.report_period,
  c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring,
  c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy,
  c.total_operating_revenue,
  c.operating_revenue_yoy_growth,
  i.operating_expense_rnd_expenses,
  i.operating_expense_selling_expenses
FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet c
LEFT JOIN income_sheet i ON c.stock_code = i.stock_code AND c.report_period = i.report_period
WHERE c.stock_code IN ('002603', '002566', '300158', '002728', '002317', '600222', '600080', '002198', '000590', '002589', '603858', '600329', '002107', '002349', '600572', '600518')
  AND (c.report_period = '2025Q3' OR c.report_period = '2024Q3')
ORDER BY c.stock_code, c.report_period DESC"}

  "sources": [
    "数据来源: income_sheet, core_performance_indicators_sheet",
    "SQL: SELECT \n  c.stock_code,\n  c.stock_abbr,\n  c.report_period,\n  c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring,\n  c.net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy,\n  c.total_operating_revenue,\n  c.operating_revenue_yoy_growth,\n  i.operating_expense_rnd_expenses,\n  i.operating_expense_selling_expenses\nFROM core_performance_indicators_sheet c\nLEFT JOIN income_sheet i ON c.stock_code = i.stock_code AND c.report_period = i.report_period\nWHERE c.stock_code IN ('002603', '002566', '300158', '002728', '002317', '600222', '600080', '002198', '000590', '002589', '603858', '600329', '002107', '002349', '600572', '600518')\n  AND (c.report_period = '2025Q3' OR c.report_period = '2024Q3')\nORDER BY c.stock_code, c.report_period DESC",
    "返回 32 条记录"
  ]
